items.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Microsoft 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
items.body:
Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 10.02% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 23.47%. Currently, Microsoft has a market capitalization of $3.16 trillion. 
Buying $100 In MSFT: If an investor had bought $100 of MSFT stock 10 years ago, it would be worth $816.73 today based on a price of $425.02 for MSFT at the time of writing.
